article_title: Sony Reveals Until Dawn 2 for PS5 in 2027, Handing the Horror Sequel to Firesprite Instead of Original Creator Supermassive Games

content_preview.title: Sony Reveals Until Dawn 2 for PS5 in 2027, Handing the Horror Sequel to Firesprite Instead of Original Creator Supermassive Games
content_preview.summary: Until Dawn 2 launches on PS5 in 2027, developed by Sony's Liverpool studio Firesprite rather than original creator Supermassive Games.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Sony has announced *Until Dawn 2*, a sequel to its 2015 survival-horror hit, with the game [coming to PS5 in 2027](https://blog.playstation.com/2026/06/02/until-dawn-2-is-coming-to-ps5-in-2027/) according to the PlayStation Blog. The most notable detail of the reveal is not the new setting but the credits: the sequel will be developed by Sony's own Liverpool studio Firesprite, not Supermassive Games, the studio that created the original.

As [Video Games Chronicle reported](https://...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News piece (632 words, within the 400-1200 range). Clear Overview/What We Know/Background/What We Don't Know/Analysis sections. Leads with the genuinely newsworthy angle (Firesprite developing the sequel instead of original creator Supermassive) rather than burying it.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 3 source snapshots read from disk and verified; all three SHA-256 hashes match the manifest exactly. source-0 (blog.playstation.com, official PlayStation Blog, status 200): confirmed 'PS5 in 2027', the Firesprite 'took the reins on Until Dawn 2 as our first release since Horizon: Call of the Mountain' quote, 'the wildly popular paranormal channel, Dead True', the Dr Hill / Peter Stormare return quote ('Amongst the characters in today's reveal...'), and the Butterfly Effect quote ('It's not just the huge moments...') all verbatim. source-1 (videogameschronicle.com, status 200): confirmed the headline Firesprite-not-Supermassive quote verbatim, plus the staged-stunts/tropical-island premise quotes verbatim, and the State of Play reference. source-2 (en.wikipedia.org, status 200): confirmed the 2015 interactive-drama/Supermassive/Sony Computer Entertainment quote, PlayStation 4 / August 2015 release, 'eight young adults...Blackwood Mountain' quote, butterfly-effect-system quote, and the Ballistic Moon / 4 October 2024 / Unreal Engine 5 / Windows remake details. All three domains are on config/source_allowlist.txt.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every specific (PS5, 2027, Firesprite, Supermassive, Dead True, Dr Hill, Peter Stormare, Butterfly Effect, PS4 Aug 2015, Blackwood Mountain, Ballistic Moon, 4 Oct 2024, Unreal Engine 5) traces to a cited allowlisted source. No orphan URLs: all 3 body URLs appear in article.sources. The deliberately-omitted unverified cast claims (Neil Newbon / Dacre Montgomery, sourced only to non-allowlisted Shacknews) are genuinely absent from both the article and its cited sources. The /article/ cross-reference to the June State of Play recap resolves to an existing published article.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. The Analysis section frames the Sony-first-party-stewardship pattern as observation grounded in cited facts (2024 remake by Ballistic Moon + 2027 sequel by Firesprite), without sensationalism or editorializing. No AI self-reference.
editor_notes.originality: Not a duplicate. The only prior mention of Until Dawn 2 is a single passing line in the June State of Play roundup article, which this piece correctly cross-references. This is the first dedicated article on Until Dawn 2 and the Firesprite handoff angle.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: High-quality, fully-sourced News submission. All quotes verbatim, all specifics traceable to allowlisted sources, no fabrication, no orphan URLs, no duplication. Approved for publication.
